blog_title: Zero Investment T-Shirt Brand From College — ₹3,000 to Crores Real Journey 2017-2026
caption:
Why 240 GSM royal blue is impossible to find 😬

Dyeing cost jumps ₹15 per piece for dark shades on heavy fabric. At 180 GSM? ₹22. At 240 GSM? ₹37. Manufacturers skip it — low demand, high margin squeeze.

Want 240 GSM oversized blanks in royal blue? Talk to us directly. Minimum 300-500 pieces. Custom dye lots, no compromise.

Save this if you're sourcing bulk blanks 👇
